task_completion.description: Set the outer volume path and size
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Volume Creation Wizard showing the volume location set to '/home/ga/Volumes/plausible_deniability.hc' and the volume size set to 50 MB.

task_completion.description: Set outer volume encryption and hash algorithms
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Wizard showing AES selected for the Encryption Algorithm and SHA-512 selected for the Hash Algorithm.

task_completion.description: Mount outer volume and copy decoy files
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing the files 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt' and 'FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv' inside the mounted VeraCrypt volume directory.
VeraCrypt Wizard showing 'Hidden VeraCrypt volume' selected, or the wizard progressing through the Hidden Volume creation steps (e.g., Direct Mode).

task_completion.description: Set hidden volume size and encryption
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt Wizard showing the hidden volume size set to 20 MB, with AES encryption and SHA-512 hash algorithms selected.
A VeraCrypt dialog box or terminal output confirming that the hidden volume has been successfully created.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine VeraCrypt application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual VeraCrypt GUI or authentic VeraCrypt CLI commands being executed, not a text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: Decoy files were genuinely copied from the source
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal shows copying files from '/home/ga/Documents/decoy_data/' rather than creating empty dummy files with the same names.

integrity.description: Passwords were used in the application, not just written in text
integrity.visual_evidence: The passwords 'CoverStory2024' and 'RealSecret!789' should be seen entered into VeraCrypt password fields or CLI prompts, not just typed into a standalone text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The outer volume must be located at '/home/ga/Volumes/plausible_deniability.hc'. The expected decoy files are 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt' and 'FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv', sourced from '/home/ga/Documents/decoy_data/'. The outer volume password is 'CoverStory2024' and the hidden volume password is 'RealSecret!789'. The outer volume size should be 50MB and the hidden volume size should be 20MB.
